ground_truth: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced GPT-5 at the Moscone Center in San Francisco on March 15, 2025, claiming it outperforms Google DeepMind's Gemini Ultra 2.0 on the MMLU benchmark. Microsoft confirmed GPT-5 integration into Azure AI Studio and Microsoft Copilot by April 2025. AI safety researcher Geoffrey Hinton and EU regulators called for independent safety evaluations before deployment.
summary: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5 at a developer conference in San Francisco on March 15, 2025. GPT-5 scores 94% on the MMLU benchmark, surpassing Google DeepMind's Gemini Ultra 2.0.
